name: byte-brane-agent-workflow-skill-sources
description: Install sources and capability map for the Byte-Brane clarify-before-execute workflow and related Skill families.

core.description: Install only the original clarify-before-execute Skill from this repository.

ecc.description: Install ECC/Everything Claude Code Skills from upstream. This repository does not vendor ECC content.

items.name: everything-claude-code
items.license_status: MIT observed in upstream checkout; verify upstream before redistribution

codex-plugins.description: Official Codex/OpenAI plugin/runtime Skills. Install through Codex plugin or runtime tooling, not by copying cached files.

items.name: documents-spreadsheets-presentations
items.install_method: provided by compatible Codex desktop/runtime environment

inventory-only.description: Skills listed in SKILLS_INVENTORY.md whose original source/license must be checked before copying or redistribution.

items.name: agency-* / dbs-* / user-community-skills
items.install_method: manual: locate upstream source and verify license
